name: Wiser Price Intelligence API
what_it_does: Retail price intelligence and market insights platform with REST API — tracking competitor prices across online retailers, monitoring MAP (Minimum Advertised Price) compliance by resellers, collecting consumer sentiment from reviews and surveys, and providing actionable pricing strategy recommendations.
use_cases: Querying competitor pricing data for SKUs across major retail channels via API
Monitoring MAP violations by resellers and distributors for brand compliance enforcement
Pulling market basket analysis data for assortment and pricing optimization
Integrating price intelligence data with ERP or pricing engine for automated adjustments
Tracking share of voice and digital shelf analytics across e-commerce platforms
not_for: B2B SaaS competitive intelligence (Wiser is for retail/product pricing)
Real-time stock and securities market data
Small single-channel retailers with few competitor SKUs
best_when: A brand, manufacturer, or multi-channel retailer needs comprehensive competitive pricing intelligence, MAP monitoring, and consumer insights across multiple retail channels and geographies.
avoid_when: You sell services rather than physical products, have no distribution channel with resellers, or need only simple single-competitor price tracking (use Prisync).

auth.notes: API token from Wiser account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for price change alerts and MAP violations. No OAuth2. Enterprise API access may require additional agreement.

pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2013. Acquired by Numerator in 2022. Enterprise-focused pricing intelligence. MAP monitoring unique differentiator for brands with resellers. Consumer sentiment via consumer panel and surveys. 900+ brands and retailers. Strong in consumer electronics, home goods, apparel.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for price data, MAP violations, and market insights. Bearer token auth. Limited public API documentation — enterprise partnership required. Price data includes historical and current. MAP monitoring requires reseller channel setup. Data freshness varies by category and plan.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Price reads idempotent by SKU and date. MAP violation reads idempotent by violation ID. Market insight reads idempotent by query parameters.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise API access requires sales engagement — not self-serve
MAP monitoring requires providing reseller channel list to Wiser
Price data collection frequency varies by category and plan tier
Numerator acquisition may affect API roadmap — verify current documentation
Consumer sentiment data is from panel methodology — not real-time scraping

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Pricing data is business-sensitive competitive intelligence. Numerator parent company security standards apply post-acquisition.
